printed.name: Double Leg
printed.setup: Lying supine, pelvis in front of shoulder rests (approximately 1/4 way down carriage from shoulder rests), legs in tabletop position, straps around thighs, above knees, chest lifted, fingers interlaced behind head, footbar down
cues: Draw knees in toward forehead beyond tabletop position
Maintain slight tension in straps when straightening legs
